# Enhanced robots.txt for optimal SEO performance
# Allow all major search engines and AI crawlers
# Last updated: 2026-04-13

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Bingbot  
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# AI Search Engine Crawlers - OpenAI
User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# AI Search Engine Crawlers - Anthropic
User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Anthropic-AI
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# AI Search Engine Crawlers - Google AI
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: GoogleOther
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# AI Search Engine Crawlers - Other AI Providers
User-agent: AI2Bot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: YouBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: BraveBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: cohere-ai
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Meta-ExternalFetcher
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: FacebookBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: AppleBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Gemini / Google Bard
User-agent: Google-InspectionTool
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Microsoft Copilot
User-agent: bingpreview
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Social Media Crawlers
User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /

User-agent: WhatsApp
Allow: /

User-agent: Pinterest
Allow: /

User-agent: Slackbot
Allow: /

User-agent: TelegramBot
Allow: /

# Local Search Crawlers
User-agent: LocalBot
Allow: /

User-agent: YelpBot
Allow: /

User-agent: TrustpilotBot
Allow: /

# General crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*?*utm_*
Disallow: /*?*ref=*
Disallow: /*?*fbclid=*
Disallow: /*?*gclid=*
Disallow: /*?*msclkid=*

# Allow important file types
Allow: /*.css$
Allow: /*.js$
Allow: /*.png$
Allow: /*.jpg$
Allow: /*.jpeg$
Allow: /*.gif$
Allow: /*.webp$
Allow: /*.svg$
Allow: /*.pdf$
Allow: /*.woff2$
Allow: /*.woff$

# Sitemap locations
Sitemap: https://www.mainteniq.co.uk/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://www.mainteniq.co.uk/news-sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://www.mainteniq.co.uk/image-sitemap.xml
